case_title: JOSE ORTIZ, et al. VS. MARY LOU ZAPAROLLI

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-16-2011 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 610
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR FEB-15-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-16-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-01-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-16-2011 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALLACE, EDWARD OF WILLIAM TOWING ORTIZ, JOSE
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST EDWARD WALLACE OF WILLIAM TOWING, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-15-2011 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-03-2011. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-16-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, nor objection filed. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2011 Set For Order To Show Cause On May-16-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2011 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiffs are sanctioned $200.00 each, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings not reported. (610)
